title: Poached Norwegian Turnip Stir-Fry
description: A bitter and juicy meal-prep Norwegian dish featuring poached turnips with a high-protein twist, ideal for breakfast or lunch.

ingredients.name: Chicken Breast
ingredients.notes: Marinate for at least 30 minutes before poaching

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Use scallions or white parts of green onions for added flavor

ingredients.name: Vegetable Stock
ingredients.notes: Filtered water can be used if vegetable stock is unavailable

instructions: Poach the turnips in a mixture of vegetable stock and olive oil until tender, about 10-15 minutes.
Meanwhile, season the chicken with salt and pepper. Poach the chicken in the same mixture as the turnips for around 8-12 minutes or until cooked through.
Heat a bit more olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onion and garlic, stirring occasionally for about 30 seconds to wilt them slightly.
Add back the poached turnips and chicken into the wok with their cooking liquid. Stir-fry gently for an additional minute or two until everything is well combined.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
